_source: gin7 manual pp.79-99 via logh7-manual-canon.md §12 (Empire pp79-89, Alliance pp90-99); PDF-verified against .omo/work/gin7manual/gin7manual.pdf pages 89-93 (Alliance text layer)
_purpose: Verification / delta file over content/manual/ship-units.json. Does NOT overwrite ship-units.json. Records which ship classes have complete stats, which Alliance numbers are extraction-uncertain, and corrections found during PDF verification.
_confidence_notes: PDF page offset: manual page P ≈ PDF page (P-1) for the ship-unit section (manual p90 Alliance battleship = PDF page 89).
Empire stat tables (pp79-89) were recovered by spatial PDF clustering and reconcile with content/ship-stats.json _raw; per-cell mapping is partially reliable.

Alliance stat tables (pp90-99) print as an UNORDERED LINEAR TEXT STREAM in the PDF text layer (verified pages 89-93). The numeric values are present and correct as-seen, but per-cell column mapping is NOT recoverable from the text layer alone. All Alliance numeric cells are therefore extraction-uncertain unless cross-checked against the rendered table image or content/ship-stats.json.
Lore / variant descriptions are high confidence for BOTH factions (full prose present in PDF text layer).
'-' = canonical absence; '·' = no token in PDF text layer (missing, NOT zero).
Maps to wire record ResponseStaticInformationUnitShip 0x030b / content/ship-stats.json.

_legend.complete: all schema columns recoverable for the flagship/standard row
_legend.partial: some cells recoverable, others OCR-lost or stream-flattened
_legend.stream: numbers present but unordered linear stream — per-cell mapping not recoverable from text layer

empire.note: flagship armor/speed cells OCR-lost (digest §12.2); pool 390, shield 70/30, beam 48, gun 100, missile 80, AA 80 recovered.
pool 410, speed 23,000, shield 70/28, missile 100; max armor 48 interpolated.
pool 200, speed 30,000, armor 2/4/8, shield 30/19, gun 104, missile 50, AA 50, sensor 2,400, repair 40.
pool 170, speed 27,000, armor 2/5/7, shield 20/19, gun 24, missile 40, AA 40, sensor 4,000, repair 20.
GIS12 refit; carries 10-12 fighters; Ⅳ low-output engine speed 10,000.
GIS12 refit + torpedo hangar; Ⅳ fast 20,000.
merchant modular hauler, loadage 4,000, unarmed; flagship speed 10,000, armor 4/8/20, shield 20/16, missile 10, AA 30, sensor 2,400.

alliance.note: flagship pool 400, shield 70/20, recurring tuple armor 30/18/10, beam 5,600, speed 22,000 all present in text stream but unordered. Counterpart to SS75. Ⅷ=無人艦 (25% crew, no fighters, ramming/blockade).
flagship pool 250, shield 60/22, speed 23,000 standard. ≈SK80 except missiles. Ⅷ=フリゲート艦 escort, Ⅶ cost ≈ battleship.

Alliance-only. 3× missile output of 795-cruiser (confirmed PDF line: '795年型標準巡航艦の3倍のミサイル投射能力'), no beam/fighters. Missile 150/8. レダ級 (Leda-class) recon variant. Two flagship rows: crew 230 (pool 4,000?, speed 24,000, armor 16/10/6, shield 50/22) and crew 300 (speed 28,000, armor 24/14/8, shield 70/25, beam 32).

6 photon pulse cannons (confirmed PDF line: '6門の光子パルス砲'), no fighters. Flagship pool 220, speed 30,000, armor 40/19, shield guard 30. Ⅷ wartime: 4-shot external missiles, ~½ build time (confirmed '約半数の工期').
carries 100 Spartanian fighters (confirmed '単座戦闘艇スパルタニアンを100隻搭載'), gunnery ≈787 battleship. AA 64, missile 70/3, beam 6,400, speeds 18,000/16,000/14,000. Ⅱ disguised (no bow cannon).
field repair of all Alliance ships. Ⅳ=more repair material.
~2× flagship length; cargo ≤500,000 t. Ⅲ convoy-only, Ⅳ fast/cargo↓.
requisitioned high-speed merchants; carries ~600 armed troops.
flagship = landing command ship. Ⅳ anti-fortress (carries 装甲擲弾兵 only, cannot carry 装甲兵 vehicles). YEAR DISCREPANCY below.

pdfVerifiedSample._method: Extracted PDF text layer pages 89-93 with PyMuPDF; compared claims/numbers against rendered table prose.

confirmedClaims.pdf_ja: 6門の光子パルス砲を装備する重武装艦

単座戦闘艇スパルタニアンを100隻搭載

confirmedClaims.claim_en: Destroyer Ⅷ completes in ~half build time
confirmedClaims.pdf_ja: 約半数の工期で完成させる事が可能

pdfVerifiedSample.structuralFinding: Alliance table cells are emitted by the PDF text layer as a flat, unordered list of numbers interleaved with column headers (e.g. PDF page 89 emits '400 70 20 80 90' then later '23,000 28 16 8' with no row binding). Per-cell mapping requires the rendered table image or content/ship-stats.json _raw, NOT the text layer.

corrections.pdf: PDF page 89 stream shows 70 and 20 adjacent in the shield (防護値/容量) column block
corrections.correction: shield = 70 guard / 20 cap (capacity 20, not the SS75 value of 30).

corrections.field: 揚陸艦 (Alliance assault ship) year code
corrections.digest: §12.4 p98 flags 'base says 795-type, variants Ⅱ–Ⅳ say 786-type'
corrections.pdf: not re-extracted (PDF page 97); digest discrepancy retained
corrections.correction: Year discrepancy is genuine per digest; treat base=795年型, variant lore mentions 786-type — keep both, flagged uncertain.

corrections.field: Empire SS75 standard battleship — ship-units.json stats blob
corrections.digest: ship-units.json line 8 packs a very long mixed 'stats' string that interleaves SS75 and SK80-era values
corrections.correction: ship-units.json SS75 'stats' field is a concatenated multi-class OCR blob and should NOT be parsed as SS75-only numbers; use content/ship-stats.json _raw for authoritative SS75 cells.

summary.recommendation: For server encoding (0x030b / ship-stats.json), use content/ship-stats.json _raw as the numeric authority. Use this verify file's lore + confirmed-claim fields and the digest §12 for design intent. Do NOT trust Alliance per-cell numbers parsed from the PDF text layer or from ship-units.json packed 'stats' strings.
